title: integ-test-runner input
description: Required dispatch-context keys for the integ-test-runner role, per agents/integ-test-runner.md Inputs section. The runner owns the integ-test-playbook.md sandbox lifecycle (Setup/Reset/Teardown) itself; the product deploy (deploy.md) has already been done by the deployer. Consumed by callers for pre-dispatch validation only -- never appended to the prompt or shown to the LLM.

repoRoot.description: Repo root path where integ-test-playbook.md lives.

featureIds.description: Explicit list of open feature ids in this sprint's subtree, scoped by the orchestrator. An empty array is a valid dispatch (the playbook still runs as the sprint's standing confidence check); the runner never derives this list itself.
